message:
feat(e2e): add visual regression testing with Playwright snapshots

Add visual-regression.spec.ts with baseline screenshots for all public pages:
- Page layouts at 3 viewports (desktop 1280x720, tablet 768x1024, mobile 375x667)
- Component snapshots: navigation bar, footer, spotlight modal, 404 page
- 19 tests covering Home, Corpus, Distillations, Method, Glossary pages
- Threshold-based comparison (100 pixel diff allowed for anti-aliasing)
- Dark/light mode tests ready but skipped pending theme implementation

Update baselines with: bun playwright test visual-regression --update-snapshots

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
